---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-18"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(iNEXT.3D)
library(vegan)
```

```{r}
coverage_rarefy_matrix <- function(otu_matrix, 
                                   required_sizes,
                                   drop_lowcoverage = FALSE){
  
  # Calculer le coverage de chaque échantillon
  sample_coverages <- apply(otu_matrix, 2, function(sample_vector) {
    sample_vector <- sample_vector[sample_vector > 0]
    n <- sum(sample_vector)
    f1 <- sum(sample_vector == 1)
    f2 <- sum(sample_vector == 2)
    
    if (f1 > 0 && f2 > 0) {
      1 - (f1 / n) * (((n - 1) * f1) / ((n - 1) * f1 + 2 * f2))
    } else if (f1 > 0 && f2 == 0) {
      1 - (f1 / n) * (((n - 1) * f1) / ((n - 1) * f1 + 2))
    } else {
      1
    }
  })
  
  # Coverage cible
  if (is.null(coverage)) {
    coverage <- min(sample_coverages)
  }
  
  # Vérifier les échantillons
  low_coverage <- sample_coverages < coverage
  if (any(low_coverage)) {
    if (drop_lowcoverage) {
      otu_matrix <- otu_matrix[, !low_coverage, drop = FALSE]
      sample_coverages <- sample_coverages[!low_coverage]
    } else {
      stop("Certains échantillons ont un coverage insuffisant")
    }
  }
  
  
  # Raréfier chaque échantillon
  rarefied_matrix <- sapply(colnames(otu_matrix), function(sample_name) {
    sample_vector <- otu_matrix[, sample_name]
    target_size <- required_sizes %>%
      filter(Assemblage == sample_name) %>%
      pull(m)
    
    # Créer un vecteur répété de chaque OTU selon son abondance
    otu_pool <- rep(rownames(otu_matrix), times = sample_vector)
    
    # Échantillonner sans remise
    sampled_otus <- sample(otu_pool, size = target_size, replace = FALSE)
    
    # Compter les abondances
    rarefied <- table(factor(sampled_otus, levels = rownames(otu_matrix)))
    
    return(as.numeric(rarefied))
  })
  
  rownames(rarefied_matrix) <- rownames(otu_matrix)
  
  return(rarefied_matrix)
}
   
```


```{r}
load(file = "outputs/clean_data_to_analise/ps_bacteria.Rdata")

calculate.coverage.f1<- function(f1,f2, sample_size){1-(f1/sample_size) * ((sample_size-1)*f1)/((sample_size-1)*f1 + 2*f2)}

ps_bacteria %>%
  otu_table() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("OTU") %>%
  pivot_longer(-OTU, names_to = "quadrat_code", values_to = "reads") %>%
  mutate(grid_code = str_sub(quadrat_code,1,9),
         reads = floor(reads/10)) %>%
  filter(reads > 0) -> trucated_bacteria_quadat

trucated_bacteria_quadat %>%
  select(-quadrat_code) %>%
  group_by(grid_code,OTU) %>%
  summarise(reads = sum(reads))  -> trucated_bacteria_grid
```

```{r}
trucated_bacteria_quadat %>%
  group_by(quadrat_code) %>%
  mutate(sample_size =sum(reads)) %>%
  filter(reads <= 4, reads!=0) %>% 
  group_by(quadrat_code, reads, sample_size) %>% 
  summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from =reads , values_from = count, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(f1 ="1", f2 ="2", f3 ="3", f4 ="4") %>%
  mutate(f1_hat = ifelse(f3*f4>0, 4*f2^2/(3*f3)-f2*f3/(2*f4), 4*f2^2/(3*(f3+1))-f2*f3/(2*(f4+1))),
         coverage = calculate.coverage.f1(f1 ,f2 , sample_size),
         coverage_hat = calculate.coverage.f1(f1_hat, f2, sample_size)) -> quadrat_coverage_df

trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  group_by(grid_code) %>%
  mutate(sample_size =sum(reads)) %>%
  filter(reads <= 4, reads!=0) %>% 
  group_by(grid_code, reads, sample_size) %>% 
  summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from =reads , values_from = count, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(f1 ="1", f2 ="2", f3 ="3", f4 ="4") %>%
  mutate(f1_hat = ifelse(f3*f4>0, 4*f2^2/(3*f3)-f2*f3/(2*f4), 4*f2^2/(3*(f3+1))-f2*f3/(2*(f4+1))),
         coverage = calculate.coverage.f1(f1 ,f2 , sample_size),
         coverage_hat = calculate.coverage.f1(f1_hat, f2, sample_size)) -> grid_coverage_df
```
```{r}
trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTU") %>%
  t() %>%
  vegan::rarecurve(x=., step = 500, sample = min(rowSums(.)))

trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTU") %>%
  iNEXT.3D::iNEXT3D( q = c(0, 1, 2), datatype = "abundance", nboot = 0) -> inext_rare

inext_rare$TDiNextEst$size_based %>% 
  filter(Order.q == 0) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = m, y = qTD, color = Assemblage, linetype = Method)) +
  geom_point(data = filter(inext_rare$TDiNextEst$size_based %>%
                              filter(Order.q == 0), Method == "Observed"), 
             aes(x = m, y = qTD, color = Assemblage),
             size = 2) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Rarefaction" = "solid", 
               "Extrapolation" = "dashed",
               "Observed" = "solid")
    ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Sample Size", y = "Species Richness")

inext_rare$TDiNextEst$coverage_based %>% 
  filter(Order.q == 0) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(x = SC, y = qTD, color = Assemblage, linetype = Method)) +
  geom_point(data = filter(inext_rare$TDiNextEst$coverage_based %>%
                              filter(Order.q == 0), Method == "Observed"), 
             aes(x = SC, y = qTD, color = Assemblage),
             size = 2) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Rarefaction" = "solid", 
               "Extrapolation" = "dashed",
               "Observed" = "solid")
    ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Sample Size", y = "Species Richness")

inext_rare$TDiNextEst$coverage_based %>% 
  filter(Order.q == 0 & Method == "Observed") %>%
  filter(SC == min(SC, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(SC) -> min_coverage

trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTU") %>%
  estimate3D( level = NULL,q = 0, nboot = 0) %>%
  filter(Method == "Observed")
```

```{r}
trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTU") %>%
  coverage_rarefy_matrix() -> test

test %>% colSums
```


```{r}
trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTU") %>%
  coverage_rarefy_matrix()
```

```{r}
trucated_bacteria_grid %>%
              pivot_wider(names_from = "grid_code", values_from = "reads", values_fill = 0) %>%
              column_to_rownames("OTU") -> otu_matrix
# Calculer les tailles requises
iNext_object <- otu_matrix %>%
  iNEXT.3D::iNEXT3D( q = c(0), datatype = "abundance", nboot = 0)

inext_rare$TDiNextEst$coverage_based %>% 
  filter(Order.q == 0 & Method == "Observed") %>%
  filter(SC == min(SC, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(SC) -> min_coverage

otu_matrix %>%
  estimate3D(level = min_coverage, q = 0, nboot = 0) %>%
  select(Assemblage,m) -> required_sizes

set.seed(2365)
1:100 %>%
  map(\(x) otu_matrix %>%
              coverage_rarefy_matrix(required_sizes = required_sizes)) -> coverage_rarefy_list

coverage_rarefy_list[[1]] %>% str
coverage_rarefy_list[[2]] %>% str

coverage_rarefy_list[[1]]%>% hist
```


```{r}
library(sbm)
coverage_rarefy_list[[1]] %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    estimateBipartiteSBM(netMat= ., model = "poisson", 
                         dimLabels = c(row = "ASV", col = "grid_code"),
                         estimOptions = list(nbCores = 4))
```
